cases.prompt: Add a collect plan step that passes run_validation into operating-contract.
expected_decisions: Validate-run and operating-contract artifact identities are checked against the same run set
Generated argv replay is recorded before submit
expected_evidence: Producer/consumer consistency table includes required identity fields
Source-of-truth chain links collect plan, validation, and downstream report consumption
cases.notes: A downstream report consuming validation artifacts is an Agent-facing workflow contract.

cases.prompt: Update generated Codex prompt for target-local governor sweep.
expected_decisions: Generated instructions are treated as workflow product surfaces
Controller vs target-local execution locations are explicit
expected_evidence: Generated argv replay table records execution_location and required env
Claim boundary check prevents prompt success from becoming measurement evidence
cases.notes: Generated prompts that guide target-local work need workflow contract review.

cases.prompt: Change installer path for adc-lab-target and update SSH runner behavior.
expected_decisions: Installer output path and non-interactive SSH PATH compatibility are checked
Missing, PATH-missing, unsupported, and version-skew diagnostics are separated
expected_evidence: Deployment/runtime discovery table includes runner path and preflight command
Runtime workflow does not depend on undiscoverable installed binaries
cases.notes: Installer/runtime discovery compatibility is part of the workflow product contract.

cases.prompt: Add report validate-run --include-run and downstream operating-contract consumption.
expected_decisions: Artifact producer and consumer use matching typed identity
Forbidden latest/newest artifact fallback is rejected
expected_evidence: Consumer argv cites the produced validation artifact by explicit path, ref, digest, or identity
Run-set, target, and workflow identity consistency is recorded
cases.notes: Adding include-run to downstream consumption creates a multi-step evidence chain.

cases.prompt: Refactor internal JSON parsing for pressure payloads.
expected_decisions: No workflow contract report is required when no Agent-facing workflow changes
cases.notes: Internal parsing alone is outside the skill boundary unless it changes a generated workflow surface.

cases.prompt: Fix typo in README that does not affect command examples.
expected_decisions: Pure prose typo fixes do not trigger workflow contract review

cases.prompt: Change CPU load iteration calculation without changing CLI workflow.
expected_decisions: Target-local calculation changes are not enough when no generated plan, prompt, handoff, or workflow document changes
cases.notes: Measurement code can be outside the workflow contract skill if not exposed through workflow surfaces.

cases.prompt: Add ordinary unit test for suitability margin calculation.
expected_decisions: Ordinary unit tests without workflow surface changes do not require workflow contract review
cases.notes: The skill should not expand into generic testing guidance.
